purpose: Prismcade-specific external source classifications for creator-platform research. This file complements the broader reference registry and keeps IP-risky sources quarantined.

sources.name: GameMaker HTML5 Runtime
sources.prismcadeUse: Research wrapping creator-owned GameMaker HTML5 exports in Prismcade play pages, leaderboards, and profile shells.
blocked: Do not vendor runtime source into shipped Prismtek paths without license review.
Do not trust exported client code for ranked scores.
Do not ship sample or marketplace assets without provenance.

sources.name: GameMaker CLI
sources.prismcadeUse: Research local validation, packaging, and resource-editing workflows for creator-owned GameMaker projects.
blocked: Do not commit downloaded runtime/toolchain files.
Do not store credentials or account tokens.
Do not enable automatic downloads without receipts.

sources.name: Gatete Mario Engine 9
sources.prismcadeUse: Study generalized platformer controller, camera, tile, and GameMaker organization patterns only.
blocked: Do not copy Mario assets, names, levels, sounds, UI, branding, or identity.
Do not ship as a Prismcade template.
Do not import into game-local shipped paths.
Do not skip an originality pass.
